name: social-impact-accountability
description: Accountability pipeline: fetch confirmed verdict -> tiered comms drafts -> quality loop -> log

steps.name: retrieve-verdict
draft-public-debunk
draft-advertiser-notice
review-and-humanise
steps.prompt:
Review all drafted communications:
1. Language is calm and factual
2. All claims backed by verdict evidence
3. Slovak + English versions present
4. No AI-sounding patterns
Refine if needed. Respond APPROVED when satisfied:

{{input}}

steps.name: log-and-archive
steps.prompt:
Log all accountability actions and update the knowledge graph with action timestamps:

{{input}}
